---
title: "双曲线：差的几何"
subtitle: "模块一 · 第3课"
date: 2026-03-22
---

当你听到两个音箱发出的声音，声波差产生的图形就是双曲线。椭圆是"和"的曲线，双曲线是"差"的曲线——看似相反，却是一对孪生兄弟。

## 探索问题

::: {.callout-tip}
## 先想一想

两个基站同时发出信号。你的手机接收到两个信号的时间差是固定的。

1. 这意味着你到两个基站的距离差是多少？（提示：信号速度乘以时间差）
2. 满足"到两点距离差为常数"的所有位置，会形成什么形状？
3. 如果再加一个基站，得到另一条"距离差恒定"的曲线，两条曲线的交点是什么？
:::

## 几何直觉：双曲线的定义

### 动画1：拖动点 P，观察距离差

```{=html}
<div class="d3-container" id="m1_hyp_diff"></div>
<div class="d3-controls">
  <span class="value-display" id="m1_hyp_diff_info">拖动双曲线上的蓝色点 P</span>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
  const W = 700, H = 420, margin = {top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 40, left: 20};
  const w = W - margin.left - margin.right, h = H - margin.top - margin.bottom;
  const cx = w / 2, cy = h / 2;

  const svg = d3.select("#m1_hyp_diff").append("svg")
    .attr("viewBox", `0 0 ${W} ${H}`)
    .append("g").attr("transform", `translate(${margin.left},${margin.top})`);

  const a = 100, bParam = 75;
  const cLen = Math.sqrt(a * a + bParam * bParam);
  const f1 = {x: cx - cLen, y: cy};
  const f2 = {x: cx + cLen, y: cy};

  // Axes
  svg.append("line").attr("x1", 0).attr("y1", cy).attr("x2", w).attr("y2", cy)
    .attr("stroke", "#ddd").attr("stroke-width", 1);
  svg.append("line").attr("x1", cx).attr("y1", 0).attr("x2", cx).attr("y2", h)
    .attr("stroke", "#ddd").attr("stroke-width", 1);

  // Asymptotes
  svg.append("line").attr("x1", cx - w/2).attr("y1", cy - bParam/a * w/2)
    .attr("x2", cx + w/2).attr("y2", cy + bParam/a * w/2)
    .attr("stroke", "#aaa").attr("stroke-dasharray", "6,4").attr("stroke-width", 1);
  svg.append("line").attr("x1", cx - w/2).attr("y1", cy + bParam/a * w/2)
    .attr("x2", cx + w/2).attr("y2", cy - bParam/a * w/2)
    .attr("stroke", "#aaa").attr("stroke-dasharray", "6,4").attr("stroke-width", 1);

  // Hyperbola branches
  function hypPoints(sign) {
    return d3.range(-2.2, 2.21, 0.04).map(t => [
      cx + sign * a * Math.cosh(t), cy + bParam * Math.sinh(t)
    ]);
  }
  svg.append("path").attr("d", d3.line().curve(d3.curveBasis)(hypPoints(1)))
    .attr("fill", "none").attr("stroke", "#2d70b3").attr("stroke-width", 2);
  svg.append("path").attr("d", d3.line().curve(d3.curveBasis)(hypPoints(-1)))
    .attr("fill", "none").attr("stroke", "#2d70b3").attr("stroke-width", 2);

  // Foci
  svg.append("circle").attr("cx", f1.x).attr("cy", f1.y).attr("r", 6).attr("fill", "#c74440");
  svg.append("circle").attr("cx", f2.x).attr("cy", f2.y).attr("r", 6).attr("fill", "#c74440");
  svg.append("text").attr("x", f1.x).attr("y", f1.y + 22).attr("text-anchor", "middle")
    .attr("font-size", "14px").attr("fill", "#c74440").attr("font-weight", "bold").text("F₁");
  svg.append("text").attr("x", f2.x).attr("y", f2.y + 22).attr("text-anchor", "middle")
    .attr("font-size", "14px").attr("fill", "#c74440").attr("font-weight", "bold").text("F₂");

  // Lines to foci
  const line1 = svg.append("line").attr("stroke", "#e67e22").attr("stroke-width", 2);
  const line2 = svg.append("line").attr("stroke", "#27ae60").attr("stroke-width", 2);

  const dist1Label = svg.append("text").attr("font-size", "13px").attr("fill", "#e67e22").attr("font-weight", "bold");
  const dist2Label = svg.append("text").attr("font-size", "13px").attr("fill", "#27ae60").attr("font-weight", "bold");

  const diffDisplay = svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", w - 10).attr("y", 30).attr("text-anchor", "end")
    .attr("font-size", "18px").attr("font-weight", "bold").attr("fill", "#2d70b3");

  const constDisplay = svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", w - 10).attr("y", 55).attr("text-anchor", "end")
    .attr("font-size", "14px").attr("fill", "#888");

  // Draggable point
  let tParam = 0.8;
  let onRight = true;
  const pointP = svg.append("circle").attr("r", 10).attr("fill", "#2d70b3")
    .attr("stroke", "white").attr("stroke-width", 2).attr("cursor", "pointer");
  const pointLabel = svg.append("text").attr("font-size", "16px").attr("fill", "#2d70b3")
    .attr("font-weight", "bold").text("P");

  function updateP(px, py) {
    // Snap to nearest point on hyperbola
    onRight = px >= cx;
    const sign = onRight ? 1 : -1;
    // Find closest t
    tParam = Math.asinh((py - cy) / bParam);
    const ex = cx + sign * a * Math.cosh(tParam);
    const ey = cy + bParam * Math.sinh(tParam);

    pointP.attr("cx", ex).attr("cy", ey);
    pointLabel.attr("x", ex + 15).attr("y", ey - 10);

    line1.attr("x1", f1.x).attr("y1", f1.y).attr("x2", ex).attr("y2", ey);
    line2.attr("x1", f2.x).attr("y1", f2.y).attr("x2", ex).attr("y2", ey);

    const d1 = Math.sqrt((ex - f1.x) ** 2 + (ey - f1.y) ** 2);
    const d2 = Math.sqrt((ex - f2.x) ** 2 + (ey - f2.y) ** 2);
    const diff = Math.abs(d1 - d2);

    dist1Label.attr("x", (f1.x + ex) / 2 - 15).attr("y", (f1.y + ey) / 2 - 8)
      .text(`${(d1 / 50).toFixed(2)}`);
    dist2Label.attr("x", (f2.x + ex) / 2 + 10).attr("y", (f2.y + ey) / 2 - 8)
      .text(`${(d2 / 50).toFixed(2)}`);

    diffDisplay.text(`||PF₁| - |PF₂|| = ${(diff / 50).toFixed(2)}`);
    constDisplay.text(`2a = ${(2 * a / 50).toFixed(2)}（始终相等！）`);

    document.getElementById("m1_hyp_diff_info").textContent =
      `|PF₁| = ${(d1/50).toFixed(2)}, |PF₂| = ${(d2/50).toFixed(2)}, |差| = ${(diff/50).toFixed(2)}`;
  }

  pointP.call(d3.drag().on("drag", function(event) { updateP(event.x, event.y); }));
  updateP(cx + a * Math.cosh(tParam), cy + bParam * Math.sinh(tParam));
})();
</script>
```

拖动蓝色点 P 在双曲线的两支上移动。无论 P 在哪个位置，$||PF_1| - |PF_2||$ 始终等于 $2a$。这就是双曲线的定义——和椭圆相比，只是把"和"变成了"差"。

### 动画2：渐近线的引导作用

```{=html}
<div class="d3-container" id="m1_hyp_asymp"></div>
<div class="d3-controls">
  <label>b/a 比值：</label>
  <input type="range" id="m1_asymp_slider" min="20" max="200" value="75" step="5">
  <span class="value-display" id="m1_asymp_val">b/a = 0.75</span>
  <button id="m1_asymp_zoom">放大远处 🔍</button>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
  const W = 700, H = 400, margin = {top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 40, left: 20};
  const w = W - margin.left - margin.right, h = H - margin.top - margin.bottom;
  const cx = w / 2, cy = h / 2;

  const svg = d3.select("#m1_hyp_asymp").append("svg")
    .attr("viewBox", `0 0 ${W} ${H}`)
    .append("g").attr("transform", `translate(${margin.left},${margin.top})`);

  // Axes
  svg.append("line").attr("x1", 0).attr("y1", cy).attr("x2", w).attr("y2", cy)
    .attr("stroke", "#ddd").attr("stroke-width", 1);
  svg.append("line").attr("x1", cx).attr("y1", 0).attr("x2", cx).attr("y2", h)
    .attr("stroke", "#ddd").attr("stroke-width", 1);

  const asymp1 = svg.append("line").attr("stroke", "#c74440").attr("stroke-dasharray", "8,4").attr("stroke-width", 2);
  const asymp2 = svg.append("line").attr("stroke", "#c74440").attr("stroke-dasharray", "8,4").attr("stroke-width", 2);

  const branch1 = svg.append("path").attr("fill", "none").attr("stroke", "#2d70b3").attr("stroke-width", 2.5);
  const branch2 = svg.append("path").attr("fill", "none").attr("stroke", "#2d70b3").attr("stroke-width", 2.5);

  const asympLabel = svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", w - 10).attr("y", 30).attr("text-anchor", "end")
    .attr("font-size", "15px").attr("fill", "#c74440").attr("font-weight", "bold");

  const gapLabel = svg.append("text")
    .attr("x", w - 10).attr("y", 55).attr("text-anchor", "end")
    .attr("font-size", "13px").attr("fill", "#888");

  let zoomLevel = 1;
  const a = 80;

  function update(bVal) {
    const bParam = bVal / 100 * a;
    const ratio = bParam / a;
    const scale = 1 / zoomLevel;

    const tMax = 2.5 * zoomLevel;
    function hypPts(sign) {
      return d3.range(-tMax, tMax + 0.02, 0.04).map(t => [
        cx + sign * a * Math.cosh(t) * scale, cy + bParam * Math.sinh(t) * scale
      ]).filter(p => p[0] >= -20 && p[0] <= w + 20 && p[1] >= -20 && p[1] <= h + 20);
    }

    branch1.attr("d", d3.line().curve(d3.curveBasis)(hypPts(1)));
    branch2.attr("d", d3.line().curve(d3.curveBasis)(hypPts(-1)));

    const extent = w * 0.6;
    asymp1.attr("x1", cx - extent).attr("y1", cy - ratio * extent)
      .attr("x2", cx + extent).attr("y2", cy + ratio * extent);
    asymp2.attr("x1", cx - extent).attr("y1", cy + ratio * extent)
      .attr("x2", cx + extent).attr("y2", cy - ratio * extent);

    asympLabel.text(`渐近线: y = ±(${ratio.toFixed(2)})x`);
    gapLabel.text(zoomLevel > 1 ? "放大后：曲线越来越靠近渐近线，但永远不会碰到" : "点击放大按钮看远处的趋势");

    document.getElementById("m1_asymp_val").textContent = `b/a = ${ratio.toFixed(2)}`;
  }

  const slider = document.getElementById("m1_asymp_slider");
  slider.addEventListener("input", () => update(+slider.value));

  document.getElementById("m1_asymp_zoom").addEventListener("click", function() {
    zoomLevel = zoomLevel === 1 ? 3 : 1;
    this.textContent = zoomLevel > 1 ? "恢复原始比例" : "放大远处 🔍";
    update(+slider.value);
  });

  update(75);
})();
</script>
```

调节 b/a 比值，观察渐近线的斜率如何变化。渐近线就像双曲线的"骨架"——曲线在远处无限趋近渐近线，却永远不会碰到它。

## 生活中的曲线

::: {.callout-note}
## 双曲线在生活中

- **GPS/北斗定位**：接收多个卫星信号的时间差，每个时间差确定一条双曲线，交点就是你的位置
- **声波定位**：鲸鱼通过声波的时间差来判断猎物的位置
- **冷却塔**：发电厂的冷却塔是双曲面形状，这种形状能承受最大风力，同时用最少的材料
- **超音速飞行**：飞机超音速飞行时产生的锥形冲击波，与地面相交形成双曲线
:::

### 3D演示：GPS定位 — 圆（球面）的交集

GPS定位的原理：

1. **1颗卫星** → 你在以该卫星为圆心、信号传播距离为半径的**球面**上（投影到地面是一个圆）
2. **2颗卫星** → 两个球面（圆）相交，你在**两个交点**之一
3. **3颗卫星** → 三个圆的公共交点 = **你的精确位置**

```{=html}
<div class="three-container" id="three_gps">
  <div class="three-info" id="three_gps_info">🛰️ 卫星 | 📱 手机 | ⭕ 圆 = 等距离面与地面的交线</div>
</div>
<div class="d3-controls">
  <button id="gps3d_step">逐步定位 ▶</button>
  <button id="gps3d_reset">重置</button>
  <label>手机X：</label>
  <input type="range" id="gps3d_x" min="-3" max="3" value="1" step="0.1">
  <label>Z：</label>
  <input type="range" id="gps3d_y" min="-3" max="3" value="1.5" step="0.1">
  <span class="value-display" id="gps3d_readout"></span>
</div>
<script type="module">
import * as THREE from 'three';
import { OrbitControls } from 'three/addons/controls/OrbitControls.js';

(function() {
  const container = document.getElementById('three_gps');
  const readout = document.getElementById('gps3d_readout');
  const sliderX = document.getElementById('gps3d_x');
  const sliderY = document.getElementById('gps3d_y');

  const renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true });
  renderer.setPixelRatio(Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio, 2));
  renderer.setSize(container.clientWidth, container.clientHeight);
  renderer.setClearColor(0x0a0a1e);
  container.appendChild(renderer.domElement);

  const scene = new THREE.Scene();
  const camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(50, container.clientWidth / container.clientHeight, 0.1, 200);
  camera.position.set(10, 12, 10);
  camera.lookAt(0, 0, 0);

  const controls = new OrbitControls(camera, renderer.domElement);
  controls.enableDamping = true;
  controls.dampingFactor = 0.08;

  scene.add(new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.5));
  const dl = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0xffffff, 0.6);
  dl.position.set(5, 15, 5);
  scene.add(dl);

  // Ground
  const ground = new THREE.Mesh(
    new THREE.PlaneGeometry(14, 14),
    new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({ color: 0x1a5f2a, transparent: true, opacity: 0.35, side: THREE.DoubleSide })
  );
  ground.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2;
  scene.add(ground);
  const grid = new THREE.GridHelper(14, 14, 0x2a8f4a, 0x1a5f2a);
  grid.material.transparent = true; grid.material.opacity = 0.25;
  scene.add(grid);

  // 3 Satellites
  const sats = [
    { x: -3, y: 7, z: -2, color: 0xe74c3c, label: '卫星A' },
    { x: 3, y: 8, z: -1, color: 0x2ecc71, label: '卫星B' },
    { x: 0, y: 6, z: 3,  color: 0x3498db, label: '卫星C' }
  ];
  const satMeshes = [];

  sats.forEach(s => {
    const g = new THREE.Group();
    g.add(new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.3, 0.15, 0.15), new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({ color: s.color })));
    const pan = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.05, 0.5, 0.3), new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({ color: 0x4488cc }));
    const p1 = pan.clone(); p1.position.x = 0.3;
    const p2 = pan.clone(); p2.position.x = -0.3;
    g.add(p1, p2);
    g.position.set(s.x, s.y, s.z);
    scene.add(g);
    satMeshes.push(g);

    // Label
    const cv = document.createElement('canvas'); cv.width = 256; cv.height = 64;
    const cx = cv.getContext('2d');
    cx.fillStyle = '#' + s.color.toString(16).padStart(6, '0');
    cx.font = 'bold 36px sans-serif'; cx.textAlign = 'center';
    cx.fillText('🛰️ ' + s.label, 128, 45);
    const sp = new THREE.Sprite(new THREE.SpriteMaterial({ map: new THREE.CanvasTexture(cv), transparent: true }));
    sp.position.set(s.x, s.y + 0.8, s.z); sp.scale.set(2, 0.5, 1);
    scene.add(sp);
  });

  // Phone
  const phone = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.2, 16, 16), new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({ color: 0xf39c12 }));
  scene.add(phone);
  const pcv = document.createElement('canvas'); pcv.width = 128; pcv.height = 64;
  const pc = pcv.getContext('2d'); pc.font = '40px sans-serif'; pc.textAlign = 'center'; pc.fillText('📱', 64, 45);
  const phoneSprite = new THREE.Sprite(new THREE.SpriteMaterial({ map: new THREE.CanvasTexture(pcv), transparent: true }));
  phoneSprite.scale.set(0.8, 0.4, 1);
  scene.add(phoneSprite);

  // Distance lines
  const distLines = [];
  [0xe74c3c, 0x2ecc71, 0x3498db].forEach(c => {
    const geo = new THREE.BufferGeometry().setFromPoints([new THREE.Vector3(), new THREE.Vector3()]);
    const ln = new THREE.Line(geo, new THREE.LineDashedMaterial({ color: c, dashSize: 0.2, gapSize: 0.1 }));
    scene.add(ln); distLines.push(ln);
  });

  // Circle groups (one per satellite, drawn on ground y=0.05)
  const circleGroup = new THREE.Group();
  scene.add(circleGroup);

  // Sphere wireframes (showing the 3D spheres from each satellite)
  const sphereGroup = new THREE.Group();
  scene.add(sphereGroup);

  // Intersection points
  const intersectionGroup = new THREE.Group();
  scene.add(intersectionGroup);

  let visibleStep = 0; // 0=none, 1=circle A, 2=A+B, 3=A+B+C

  function drawCircleOnGround(cx, cz, radius, color) {
    const pts = [];
    for (let i = 0; i <= 128; i++) {
      const a = (i / 128) * Math.PI * 2;
      pts.push(new THREE.Vector3(cx + radius * Math.cos(a), 0.05, cz + radius * Math.sin(a)));
    }
    if (pts.length > 3) {
      const curve = new THREE.CatmullRomCurve3(pts, true);
      const tube = new THREE.TubeGeometry(curve, 100, 0.04, 6, true);
      circleGroup.add(new THREE.Mesh(tube, new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color })));
    }
  }

  function drawSphereWire(sx, sy, sz, radius, color) {
    const geo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(radius, 24, 16);
    const mat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color, transparent: true, opacity: 0.08, wireframe: true, side: THREE.DoubleSide });
    const mesh = new THREE.Mesh(geo, mat);
    mesh.position.set(sx, sy, sz);
    sphereGroup.add(mesh);
  }

  // Find intersection of two circles on ground (y=0 plane)
  function circleIntersections(x1, z1, r1, x2, z2, r2) {
    const dx = x2 - x1, dz = z2 - z1;
    const d = Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dz*dz);
    if (d > r1 + r2 || d < Math.abs(r1 - r2) || d < 0.001) return [];
    const a = (r1*r1 - r2*r2 + d*d) / (2*d);
    const h = Math.sqrt(Math.max(0, r1*r1 - a*a));
    const mx = x1 + a*dx/d, mz = z1 + a*dz/d;
    return [
      { x: mx + h*dz/d, z: mz - h*dx/d },
      { x: mx - h*dz/d, z: mz + h*dx/d }
    ];
  }

  function update() {
    const px = +sliderX.value, pz = +sliderY.value;
    phone.position.set(px, 0.2, pz);
    phoneSprite.position.set(px, 0.8, pz);

    const dists = sats.map(s => Math.sqrt((px - s.x)**2 + s.y**2 + (pz - s.z)**2));
    // Ground-projected radii: intersection of sphere with y=0 plane
    const groundRadii = sats.map((s, i) => {
      const r = dists[i];
      const h = s.y;
      return r > h ? Math.sqrt(r*r - h*h) : 0;
    });

    // Distance lines
    for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
      const pos = distLines[i].geometry.attributes.position;
      pos.setXYZ(0, px, 0.2, pz); pos.setXYZ(1, sats[i].x, sats[i].y, sats[i].z);
      pos.needsUpdate = true; distLines[i].computeLineDistances();
    }

    // Clear and redraw circles based on visibleStep
    circleGroup.clear();
    sphereGroup.clear();
    intersectionGroup.clear();

    const colors = [0xe74c3c, 0x2ecc71, 0x3498db];
    for (let i = 0; i < Math.min(visibleStep, 3); i++) {
      const gr = groundRadii[i];
      if (gr > 0.1) {
        drawCircleOnGround(sats[i].x, sats[i].z, gr, colors[i]);
        drawSphereWire(sats[i].x, sats[i].y, sats[i].z, dists[i], colors[i]);
      }
    }

    // Show intersection points
    if (visibleStep >= 2 && groundRadii[0] > 0.1 && groundRadii[1] > 0.1) {
      const pts = circleIntersections(sats[0].x, sats[0].z, groundRadii[0], sats[1].x, sats[1].z, groundRadii[1]);
      pts.forEach(p => {
        const dot = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.15, 12, 12), new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: 0xffff00 }));
        dot.position.set(p.x, 0.15, p.z);
        intersectionGroup.add(dot);
      });
    }

    if (visibleStep >= 3 && groundRadii[0] > 0.1 && groundRadii[2] > 0.1) {
      const pts = circleIntersections(sats[0].x, sats[0].z, groundRadii[0], sats[2].x, sats[2].z, groundRadii[2]);
      // Find the point closest to phone
      let best = null, bestD = Infinity;
      pts.forEach(p => {
        const d = Math.sqrt((p.x - px)**2 + (p.z - pz)**2);
        if (d < bestD) { bestD = d; best = p; }
      });
      if (best) {
        const marker = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.25, 16, 16), new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: 0xff00ff }));
        marker.position.set(best.x, 0.25, best.z);
        intersectionGroup.add(marker);
        // Label
        const lc = document.createElement('canvas'); lc.width = 256; lc.height = 64;
        const lx = lc.getContext('2d');
        lx.fillStyle = '#ff00ff'; lx.font = 'bold 32px sans-serif'; lx.textAlign = 'center';
        lx.fillText('✓ 定位成功', 128, 45);
        const ls = new THREE.Sprite(new THREE.SpriteMaterial({ map: new THREE.CanvasTexture(lc), transparent: true }));
        ls.position.set(best.x, 0.8, best.z); ls.scale.set(2, 0.5, 1);
        intersectionGroup.add(ls);
      }
    }

    const stepLabels = ['点击"逐步定位"开始', '1颗卫星 → 1个圆（无数可能位置）', '2颗卫星 → 2个交点', '3颗卫星 → 精确定位 ✓'];
    readout.textContent = stepLabels[visibleStep] + (visibleStep > 0 ?
      ` | d₁=${dists[0].toFixed(1)} d₂=${dists[1].toFixed(1)} d₃=${dists[2].toFixed(1)}` : '');
  }

  sliderX.addEventListener('input', update);
  sliderY.addEventListener('input', update);

  document.getElementById('gps3d_step').addEventListener('click', function() {
    visibleStep = Math.min(visibleStep + 1, 3);
    update();
    if (visibleStep >= 3) this.textContent = '定位完成 ✓';
  });

  document.getElementById('gps3d_reset').addEventListener('click', function() {
    visibleStep = 0;
    document.getElementById('gps3d_step').textContent = '逐步定位 ▶';
    sliderX.value = 1; sliderY.value = 1.5;
    update();
  });

  update();

  function animate() {
    requestAnimationFrame(animate);
    satMeshes.forEach((m, i) => { m.rotation.y += 0.005 + i * 0.002; });
    controls.update();
    renderer.render(scene, camera);
  }
  animate();

  const ro = new ResizeObserver(() => {
    const w = container.clientWidth, h = container.clientHeight;
    if (w === 0 || h === 0) return;
    camera.aspect = w / h; camera.updateProjectionMatrix(); renderer.setSize(w, h);
  });
  ro.observe(container);
})();
</script>
```

点击 **"逐步定位"** 按钮，逐步添加卫星信号：

1. **1颗卫星** → 🔴 红色圆：你在这个圆上的某处（无数可能）
2. **2颗卫星** → 🔴+🟢 两个圆相交 = 🟡 两个候选点
3. **3颗卫星** → 🔴+🟢+🔵 三个圆的公共交点 = 🟣 精确定位

用鼠标拖拽旋转3D场景。半透明球面显示每颗卫星的信号覆盖范围（球面与地面的交线就是圆）。

## Desmos探索

```{=html}
<div id="m1_03_desmos" class="desmos-container"></div>
<script src="https://www.desmos.com/api/v1.9/calculator.js?apiKey=dcb31709b452b1cf9dc26972add0fda6"></script>
<script>
  var m1_03_calc = Desmos.GraphingCalculator(document.getElementById('m1_03_desmos'), {
    expressions: true, settingsMenu: false
  });
  m1_03_calc.setExpression({ id: 'a', latex: 'a = 2', sliderBounds: { min: 0.5, max: 4, step: 0.1 } });
  m1_03_calc.setExpression({ id: 'b', latex: 'b = 1.5', sliderBounds: { min: 0.5, max: 4, step: 0.1 } });
  m1_03_calc.setExpression({ id: 'hyp', latex: '\\frac{x^2}{a^2} - \\frac{y^2}{b^2} = 1', color: '#2d70b3' });
  m1_03_calc.setExpression({ id: 'asymp1', latex: 'y = \\frac{b}{a} x', color: '#c74440', lineStyle: 'DASHED' });
  m1_03_calc.setExpression({ id: 'asymp2', latex: 'y = -\\frac{b}{a} x', color: '#c74440', lineStyle: 'DASHED' });
  m1_03_calc.setExpression({ id: 'c_val', latex: 'c = \\sqrt{a^2 + b^2}' });
  m1_03_calc.setExpression({ id: 'f1', latex: '(-c, 0)', color: '#388c46', pointStyle: 'POINT', pointSize: 8 });
  m1_03_calc.setExpression({ id: 'f2', latex: '(c, 0)', color: '#388c46', pointStyle: 'POINT', pointSize: 8 });
  m1_03_calc.setMathBounds({ left: -8, right: 8, bottom: -6, top: 6 });
</script>
```

调节 $a$ 和 $b$，观察双曲线的开口大小和渐近线的变化。注意：双曲线的 $c^2 = a^2 + b^2$，和椭圆的 $c^2 = a^2 - b^2$ 正好相反。

## 参考视频

```{=html}
<div class="video-switch">
  <button class="active" onclick="this.parentElement.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));this.classList.add('active');this.parentElement.nextElementSibling.querySelectorAll('.video-source').forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('active'));this.parentElement.nextElementSibling.querySelector('.vs-bilibili').classList.add('active')">📺 B站原版</button>
  <button onclick="this.parentElement.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));this.classList.add('active');this.parentElement.nextElementSibling.querySelectorAll('.video-source').forEach(s=>s.classList.remove('active'));this.parentElement.nextElementSibling.querySelector('.vs-github').classList.add('active')">💾 GitHub镜像</button>
</div>
<div class="video-panel">
  <div class="video-source vs-bilibili active">
    <div class="video-container"><iframe src="//player.bilibili.com/player.html?bvid=BV15t4y1N7UN&page=1" scrolling="no" border="0" frameborder="no" framespacing="0" allowfullscreen="true" style="width:100%;height:100%;position:absolute;top:0;left:0;"></iframe></div>
  </div>
  <div class="video-source vs-github">
    <div class="video-container">
      <video controls preload="metadata" style="width:100%;height:100%;position:absolute;top:0;left:0;">
        <source src="https://github.com/ymote/conics/releases/download/v1.0/04_.mp4" type="video/mp4">
      </video>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## 关键帧

![双曲线的两焦点定义](../images/ch04/frame_01.jpg)

![距离差保持不变](../images/ch04/frame_02.jpg)

![渐近线引导曲线走向](../images/ch04/frame_03.jpg)

![双曲线的两支](../images/ch04/frame_04.jpg)

## 高考真题

::: {.callout-warning}
## 高考真题：2020年 全国II卷 第5题

已知双曲线 $C: \dfrac{x^2}{a^2}-\dfrac{y^2}{b^2}=1\ (a>0,b>0)$ 的左、右焦点分别为 $F_1, F_2$，$P$ 是 $C$ 上的一点，且在第一象限，$|PF_1|=3, |PF_2|=1, |F_1F_2|=2\sqrt{3}$，则 $C$ 的离心率为（　　）

A. $\sqrt{2}$ 　B. $\sqrt{3}$ 　C. $\sqrt{5}$ 　D. $\sqrt{6}$

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## 解题思路与答案

P 在第一象限（右支），所以 $|PF_1|-|PF_2|=2a$。

$|PF_1|-|PF_2|=3-1=2$，所以 $2a=2$，$a=1$。

$|F_1F_2|=2c=2\sqrt{3}$，所以 $c=\sqrt{3}$。

离心率 $e=\dfrac{c}{a}=\sqrt{3}$。

**答案：B**
:::
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
## 高考真题：2016年 全国I卷 第11题

已知 $F_1, F_2$ 是双曲线 $C: x^2-\dfrac{y^2}{8}=1$ 的左、右焦点，$P$ 是 $C$ 上一点，$|PF_1|=4$，则 $|PF_2|=$（　　）

A. $2$ 或 $6$ 　B. $2$ 　C. $6$ 　D. $6$ 或 $2$

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## 解题思路与答案

$a^2=1, b^2=8$，$c^2=9$，$c=3$，$a=1$。

由双曲线定义 $||PF_1|-|PF_2||=2a=2$。

设 $|PF_2|=d$，则 $|4-d|=2$。

- 若 $4-d=2$，则 $d=2$，此时 $|PF_1|>|PF_2|$，P 在右支（离 $F_2$ 更近）。需验证 $|PF_2|\geq c-a=2$ ✓
- 若 $4-d=-2$，则 $d=6$，此时 $|PF_2|>|PF_1|$，P 在左支。需验证 $|PF_1|\geq c-a=2$，即 $4\geq 2$ ✓

两种情况都成立，$|PF_2|=2$ 或 $6$。

**答案：A**

**关键：** 双曲线有两支，距离差可正可负，所以要考虑两种情况。
:::
:::

## 本课要点

::: {.callout-important}
## 记住这些

1. **双曲线的定义**：平面上到两定点距离**差**的绝对值为常数（$2a$）的点的轨迹
2. 椭圆是"和"，双曲线是"差"——这是最核心的区别
3. **渐近线** $y = \pm\frac{b}{a}x$ 是双曲线的"骨架"，曲线在远处无限趋近但不相交
4. 双曲线有**两支**，分别在两条渐近线围成的对角区域内
:::
